candidates.why: Valid overhead bucket, but candidate list misses larger SG&A component rows present in the statement.

Per rules, selected component rows and excluded totals like 'Operating costs' and any balancing rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales costs, [Income Statement] Administration costs

candidates.why: Best single reported finance/interest cost line when a single interest-expense line is needed.
